---
title: "Data Professionals Survey Report"
description: "The aims of this dashboard is to explore the dataprofessionals activity and their perceptions."
image: featured.png
image-height: "500"
image-width: "1200"
categories:
  - PowerBI Dashboard
  - Visualization
---


```{=html}
<a href="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiZWIyNWZmOWYtOTFiNi00MTVkLWFjMTAtOTU2OGJlOTJjYjcyIiwidCI6ImRmODY3OWNkLWE4MGUtNDVkOC05OWFjLWM4M2VkN2ZmOTVhMCJ9&pageName=ReportSection" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Live Dashboard</a>
```
